## Recent Decisions (last 5)

| Date | Scope | Decision | Rationale | Consequence |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 2026-03-22 | External ecosystems | Import capabilities by folder instead of copying donor repos wholesale | Reduces drift, noise, and donor-specific coupling | Merge work will proceed through phased folder lanes |
| 2026-03-23 | Optional packs | Deliver automation/MCP and UX as opt-in plugin packs, not as core agents | Keeps external ecosystem capabilities available without weakening the root-first default experience | New workflow conductors live under `plugins/`, while core memory remains shared in `.specify/memory/` |
| 2026-03-23 | Activation model | Ship supported packs in-repo, keep only the root runtime surface default-active, and treat the rest as available-but-inactive until explicitly enabled | Matches the desired “include everything, activate selectively” strategy without forcing optional packs into the default runtime | Docs, manifests, settings, and validators should converge on `shipped` vs `default-active` vs `available-but-inactive` semantics |
| 2026-03-23 | Shared Atlas source | Treat `plugins/atlas-orchestration-team/agents` as the canonical shared Atlas source and `.github/agents` as the default-active runtime copy plus aliases | Preserves zero-setup runtime UX while giving the shared Atlas pack a single authoring surface | Shared-pack docs, validators, manifests, and sync guidance must point plugin-first for edits while keeping root-first for runtime activation |
| 2026-03-25 | Memory | Zeus memory continuity via hook-backed sync | File-backed hook avoids Layer-0→Layer-2 delegation; `SubagentStart` triggers `sync_memory_context.py` → `zeus-context.md` | Zeus reads compact snapshot at run start without agent delegation; MCP Level 3 available via `.vscode/mcp.json` |
